name: Custom Application Deployment
description: Example template showing how to create custom deployment templates

steps.name: Create deployment directory
steps.description: Set up the directory structure for deployment

steps.name: Create environment file
Install dependencies
steps.command: cd ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/${APP_NAME} && npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install

steps.name: Stop existing container
steps.description: Stop and remove the old container if running
steps.command: docker stop ${APP_NAME}-container || true && docker rm ${APP_NAME}-container || true

steps.name: Run new container
steps.command: docker run -d --name ${APP_NAME}-container -p ${PORT}:${PORT} -e NODE_ENV=${ENVIRONMENT} -e DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL} -e API_KEY=${API_KEY} --restart unless-stopped ${APP_NAME}:latest

steps.name: Wait for container startup
steps.description: Give the container time to start

steps.name: Test health endpoint
steps.command: sleep 3 && curl -f http://localhost:${PORT}/health || curl -f http://localhost:${PORT}/ || echo 'Service starting...'

steps.name: Send Slack notification
steps.description: Notify Slack channel of successful deployment
steps.command: if [ -n '${SLACK_WEBHOOK}' ]; then curl -X POST ${SLACK_WEBHOOK} -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "✅ ${APP_NAME} deployed successfully on ${ENVIRONMENT}"}'; fi

rollbackSteps.name: Revert to previous commit
rollbackSteps.command: cd ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/${APP_NAME} && git revert HEAD || git reset --hard HEAD~1

rollbackSteps.name: Rebuild previous version
rollbackSteps.command: cd ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/${APP_NAME} && pnpm install && pnpm build && docker build -t ${APP_NAME}:previous .

documentation.title: Custom Application Deployment
documentation.description: Complete guide for deploying your custom application

sections.title: Setup Requirements
sections.content: Ensure your repository has a Dockerfile in the root directory and a package.json for Node.js dependencies

sections.title: Environment Variables
sections.content: All sensitive data should be passed as secret parameters. They will be safely interpolated into the .env file

sections.title: Health Checks
sections.content: The template expects a /health endpoint. If your app doesn't have one, modify the postDeployment section

sections.title: Rollback Strategy
sections.content: The rollback will revert the Git commit and rebuild from the previous version

sections.title: Monitoring
sections.content: After deployment, monitor the container logs: docker logs -f ${APP_NAME}-container
